name: armini-monorepo
description: ARMINI monorepo — mobile app (armini/) + AI Gateway (ai-gateway/) + MCP server (mcp/) + mock-backend/. See README.md for the four-process layout.

scripts.dev: concurrently --names mock,mcp,gateway --prefix-colors blue,magenta,green --kill-others-on-fail "npm --prefix mock-backend run dev" "npm --prefix mcp run dev" "npm --prefix ai-gateway run dev"
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix mock-backend run typecheck && npm --prefix mcp run typecheck && npm --prefix ai-gateway run typecheck && npm --prefix armini exec -- tsc --noEmit
